## Checks

- [ ] I used only public or synthetic examples.
- [ ] I did not include secrets, keys, logs, account data, user data, private repo names, or raw transcripts.
- [ ] I kept claims narrow and did not imply this replaces security, legal, compliance, or production review.
- [ ] I ran `python scripts/check-all.py`, or explained why I could not.
- [ ] I read `docs/local-checks.md` if a check failed or if I changed public-facing docs.
- [ ] I noted anything I could not verify.
